hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(process.platform!=='win32'&&!process.env.TMUX&&!process.env.TMUX_PANE&&/(npm run dev\b|pnpm( run)? dev\b|yarn dev\b|bun run dev\b)/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: Dev server must run in tmux for log access');console.error('[Hook] Use: tmux new-session -d -s dev \"npm run dev\"');console.error('[Hook] Then: tmux attach -t dev');process.exit(2)}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block dev servers outside tmux - ensures you can access logs

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(process.platform!=='win32'&&!process.env.TMUX&&/(npm (install|test)|pnpm (install|test)|yarn (install|test)?|bun (install|test)|cargo build|make\b|docker\b|pytest|vitest|playwright)/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Consider running in tmux for session persistence');console.error('[Hook] tmux new -s dev  |  tmux attach -t dev')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Reminder to use tmux for long-running commands

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Review changes before push...');console.error('[Hook] Continuing with push (remove this hook to add interactive review)')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Reminder before git push to review changes

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(!/\bgit\b[^|;&]*\bcommit\b/.test(cmd)){console.log(d);return}let diff='';try{diff=require('child_process').execSync('git diff --cached --no-color -U0',{encoding:'utf8'})}catch(e){console.log(d);return}if(!diff){console.log(d);return}const rules=[{re:/gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}/g,name:'GitHub token'},{re:/-----BEGIN (?:RSA |EC |OPENSSH |DSA |PGP )?PRIVATE KEY-----/g,name:'private key'},{re:/AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}/g,name:'AWS access key',excl:['AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE']}];for(const r of rules){for(const m of diff.matchAll(r.re)){if(r.excl&&r.excl.includes(m[0])){continue}process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'deny',permissionDecisionReason:r.name+' detected in staged changes (value redacted) \u2014 unstage or remove the secret before committing.'}}));return}}console.log(d);return}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block git commit when staged changes contain a high-confidence secret
Rhizome advisory: warn when Bash is used for code navigation instead of Rhizome MCP tools (exit 0, advisory only)
Doc file warning: warn about non-standard documentation files (exit code 0; warns only)
Suggest manual compaction at logical intervals

UserPromptSubmit.description: Cortina runtime: capture submitted prompts into scoped lifecycle state

SessionStart.description: Load previous context and detect package manager on new session

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/gh pr create/.test(cmd)){const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';const m=out.match(/https:\/\/github.com\/[^/]+\/[^/]+\/pull\/\d+/);if(m){console.error('[Hook] PR created: '+m[0]);const repo=m[0].replace(/https:\/\/github.com\/([^/]+\/[^/]+)\/pull\/\d+/,'$1');const pr=m[0].replace(/.+\/pull\/(\d+)/,'$1');console.error('[Hook] To review: gh pr review '+pr+' --repo '+repo)}}}catch{}})"

PostToolUse.description: Log PR URL and provide review command after PR creation

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/(npm run build|pnpm build|yarn build)/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Build completed (placeholder: no analysis logic implemented yet)')}}catch{}})"

PostToolUse.description: TODO(placeholder): async hook for build analysis — replace command with real analysis logic before use
Auto-format JS/TS files after edits (auto-detects Biome or Prettier)
Warn about console.log statements after edits
Warn about inline-dash comment style, suggest boxed style
Cortina runtime: capture errors, validations, corrections, and export or ingest signals
Capture PR review feedback in hyphae

Stop.description: Check for console.log in modified files after each response
Cortina runtime: capture session-end summaries into scoped lifecycle state

SessionEnd.description: Cortina runtime: capture session-end event into scoped lifecycle state (synchronous — must complete before exit)
